task: Capture layout reflow for viewfinder-first low-position parameter console

layout_changes.screen_vertical_spacing: Reduced spacing around intent switcher, parameter console, and shutter action area to return more height to preview.

viewfinder_protection.strategy: Keep the horizontal ruler in the bottom control flow and reduce its height instead of overlaying it over the product subject.
viewfinder_protection.value_badge: Kept inside the ruler strip with smaller padding and lower y position.
viewfinder_protection.lens_entry: No lens logic changes; lower console profile reduces overlap pressure.
viewfinder_protection.shutter_button: Bottom action bar remains visible and is not covered by the parameter console.

contract_protection.shutter: unchanged; ISO manual keeps Shutter LOCK
contract_protection.focus: not returned to bottom parameter bar

validation.notes: Build passed with the existing nested xcodeproj warning. Device visual validation remains required.

risks: Compressed ruler labels may need device screenshot validation for readability.
The low-position layout is code-level verified only until device screenshots confirm the final visual balance.
If the console still feels too tall on small screens, the next layout pass should further lower or conditionally collapse the expanded ruler.
next_recommended_package: Independent Focus UI preflight after device screenshot confirmation of the low-position five-parameter console.
